reason: Verify push/deploy result satisfies stated requirements, scope limits, and acceptance criteria.
Check executed commands match remote/branch, no-secret, staging, and rollback design.
Check every planned phase has been completed or explicitly recorded as blocked/not-run.
Verify final stop/restart commands and URL match the documented staging runbook.
Verify running compose service uses the safe local staging contract.
Verify release gate/check usage remains no-secrets and artifact-focused.
Verify deployed /creative artifact still meets embedded base path and model-policy contract.
Verify no deployment check leaks or bypasses backend Creative security boundaries.
